section.para: This part covers specific sections of the Penal Code that define and regulate conduct related to patrons.

listitem.para: Section 334 (Penal Code). Fraudulent Game and Concession Operations: It is illegal for a concession operator to fraudulently obtain money from a patron by using a hidden mechanical device or other means to diminish the patron's chance of winning a prize.

Section 648a (Penal Code). Illegal Slugs and Tokens: Establishments that use slugs or tokens must post signs notifying patrons that using them for any monetary purpose outside the premises is prohibited by federal law.
